name: Golden Hours — Where 60% of Your Revenue Hides
description: 6-step deep-dive on the Golden Hours feature for owners who want to understand exactly how the 3-hour peak revenue window is detected and acted on.

steps.title: What Are Golden Hours?
steps.annotation: Golden Hours is the 3-hour window where [BAR_NAME] makes the majority of its nightly revenue. We detect it automatically by analyzing 30+ days of POS data — no setup, no manual configuration.
steps.screen_hint: Capture the Golden Hours feature page with the headline metric ('60% of revenue in 3 hours') visible.

steps.title: The 3-Hour Revenue Window Heatmap
steps.annotation: This heatmap shows every hour of every night, color-coded by revenue density. The bright band is your Golden Hours — for [BAR_NAME], that's typically Friday and Saturday between 9pm and midnight.
steps.screen_hint: Full zoom on the weekly heatmap showing peak revenue windows highlighted in bright color across days.

steps.title: Day-Over-Day Revenue Comparison
steps.annotation: Compare today's Golden Hours performance against last week, last month, and the same weeknight pattern. If Saturday at 10pm is down 18%, you'll see it immediately — not three days later in a paper report.
steps.screen_hint: Show the day-over-day comparison chart with up/down arrows and percentage deltas.

steps.title: Most Bars Make 60% of Revenue in 3 Hours
steps.annotation: This is the core insight Golden Hours surfaces. If [BAR_NAME] makes $1,000/night, $600 of it is happening in a 3-hour window. Get those 3 hours right and revenue compounds. Get them wrong and the whole night is a loss.
steps.screen_hint: Popup stat card with the '60% / 3 hours' insight in large type and a supporting visualization.

steps.title: Export the Golden Hours Report
steps.annotation: One click and you have a PDF or CSV of [BAR_NAME]'s Golden Hours over any date range — perfect for staff meetings, manager 1-on-1s, or sharing with your accountant.
steps.screen_hint: Highlight the Export button and a sample exported PDF preview.

steps.title: Unlock Staff Recommendations on Execute Tier
steps.annotation: Monitor tier shows you the Golden Hours. Execute tier ($599/mo) tells you exactly which staff to schedule, which drinks to push, and what to prep — based on your historical Golden Hours pattern. Want to see it?
steps.screen_hint: Upgrade overlay comparing Monitor vs Execute features for Golden Hours, with Execute tier highlighted.
